login.title: Sign in
login.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
login.passwordResetComplete: Your password was updated. Sign in with your new password.

accept.title: Complete registration
accept.expiredError: This invite has expired or already been used. Contact the person who sent it.
accept.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

passwordReset.title: Set new password
passwordReset.expiredError: This link is invalid or has expired. Ask an admin for a new reset link.
passwordReset.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

notifications.empty: You're all caught up. New alerts show up here.
notifications.pushStatusSummary: How push alerts reach this device
notifications.serverAvailable: This server is configured for Web Push. With browser permission and the per-trip alert option enabled, you can receive new-entry notifications.
notifications.serverUnavailable: Push is not configured on this server, so new-entry alerts cannot be delivered until the deployment provides Web Push (VAPID) keys.
notifications.serverError: Could not verify whether push is available. Alerts may not work until this check succeeds.
notifications.deviceGranted: Browser notifications are allowed on this device.
notifications.deviceDefault: Browser notifications are not allowed yet. You can allow them when you enable new-entry alerts in trip settings, or from your browser’s site settings for this app.

tripNewEntryDigest.body_one: Catch up on today's 1 new entry.
tripNewEntryDigest.body_other: Catch up on today's {{count}} new entries.

tripPhotobookPdfReady.title: Photobook (PDF) ready: {{tripName}}
tripPhotobookPdfReady.body: You can download the PDF from this trip’s settings.

releaseAnnouncement.title: Travel Journal updated to {{version}}
releaseAnnouncement.body: A newer version is ready. Reload to get the latest improvements.

settings.title: Trip Settings
settings.notCreatorRedirect: Only the trip creator can access settings.
settings.inviteSuggestionsHint: From your other trips and trips you follow
settings.collaborativeChaptersInfo: Members can co-author entries and share memories together.
settings.photobookPdfDescription: Generate a square PDF with entries grouped by day — great as a keepsake. PDF language follows the app language (Norwegian or English). When it’s ready, download it here.
settings.photobookPdfGenerating: Generating PDF — this may take a moment. We’ll notify you when it’s ready.
settings.photobookPdfReadyMessage: Your PDF is ready. Use the button below to download.
settings.photobookPdfError: Could not generate the PDF. Please try again.
settings.photobookCoverNotChosenWarning: No cover photo is chosen yet. The PDF will use a random trip photo for the cover. Pick one from the timeline image carousel (settings on a photo).
settings.photobookCoverPreviewHint: Preview the cover image you chose.

notificationMode.perEntryDescription: Get a push and an inbox item each time a member posts.
notificationMode.dailyDigestDescription: One summary each evening if there were new entries.
notificationMode.offDescription: No push, no inbox items for this trip.
notificationMode.permissionRequired: Please allow browser notifications to enable this setting.

offline.banner: You're offline — entries will sync when reconnected
offline.saved: Saved offline — will sync when reconnected
offline.conflict: Your version was not saved — someone else edited this entry

map.title: Map
map.noLocations: No entries with locations yet. Add a location when creating an entry.
map.mapboxTokenMissingDev: Add VITE_MAPBOX_TOKEN (your Mapbox public token) to the client env file, for example packages/client/.env, then restart the Vite dev server.
map.mapboxTokenMissingStaging: This staging client build is missing VITE_MAPBOX_TOKEN. Add the token to your staging build secrets or environment variables.
map.mapboxTokenMissingProd: The map service is not configured for this deployment. Contact the app administrator if this persists.

entries.emptyState: No entries yet. Be the first to post!
entries.uploadFailed: Could not upload one or more photos. Try again.
entries.uploadQueuedOffline: Upload failed; photos are saved on this device and will upload when you are back online.

carousel.photobookCoverMenuHintOn: This photo will appear on the PDF cover.
carousel.photobookCoverMenuHintOff: Turn on to use this photo on the photobook cover instead of a random one.
carousel.clearPhotobookCover: Use random photo for photobook cover
carousel.currentPhotobookCover: This image is the photobook cover
